# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

```groovy
pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download (supports S3, Artifactory, HTTP/HTTPS)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of production server hostnames/IPs to deploy to'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app/deploy',
            description: 'Target deployment directory on production servers'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_USER',
            defaultValue: 'deploy',
            description: 'SSH user for deployment to production servers'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'SSH credentials for connecting to production servers',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.jenkins.plugins.sshcredentials.impl.BasicSSHUserPrivateKey'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Credentials for Artifactory authentication (optional)',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials.impl.UsernamePasswordCredentialsImpl',
            required: false
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'AWS credentials for S3 access (optional)',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.jenkins.plugins.awscredentials.AWSCredentialsImpl',
            required: false
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATTERN',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Health check URL pattern (use {server} as placeholder, e.g., http://{server}:8080/health)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT',
            defaultValue: '120',
            description: 'Health check timeout in seconds'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'ROLLING_DEPLOY',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Deploy to servers one at a time (rolling deployment)'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Simulate deployment without actually deploying'
        )
        string(
            name: 'PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional script to run on each server before deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional script to run on each server after deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'BACKUP_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app/backups',
            description: 'Path to store backups of current deployment before overwriting'
        )
    }

    environment {
        ARTIFACTS_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        CHECKSUM_FILE = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts/checksums.sha256"
        DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: 'date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S', returnStdout: true).trim()
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Validating Pipeline Parameters ==="

                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URLS?.trim()) {
                        error "ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required. Provide comma-separated URLs."
                    }

                    if (!params.DEPLOY_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error "DEPLOY_SERVERS parameter is required. Provide comma-separated server addresses."
                    }

                    if (!params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
                        error "SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID is required for deployment."
                    }

                    env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.trim()
                    env.SERVER_LIST = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.trim()

                    def urls = env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    echo "Artifacts to download (${urls.size()}):"
                    urls.eachWithIndex { url, idx ->
                        echo "  ${idx + 1}. ${url}"
                    }

                    echo "Target servers (${servers.size()}):"
                    servers.eachWithIndex { server, idx ->
                        echo "  ${idx + 1}. ${server}"
                    }

                    echo "Deploy path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                    echo "Rolling deploy: ${params.ROLLING_DEPLOY}"
                    echo "Dry run: ${params.DRY_RUN}"

                    // Validate URL formats
                    urls.each { url ->
                        if (!url.matches('^(https?|s3)://.*')) {
                            error "Invalid URL format: ${url}. Must start with http://, https://, or s3://"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Preparing Workspace ==="
                    sh """
                        rm -rf ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
                        mkdir -p ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Downloading Artifacts ==="

                    def urls = env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def downloadResults = [:]

                    urls.each { url ->
                        def filename = extractFilename(url)
                        def targetPath = "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${filename}"

                        echo "Downloading: ${url}"
                        echo "  -> ${targetPath}"

                        try {
                            if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                                downloadFromS3(url, targetPath)
                            } else if (url.contains('artifactory') || url.contains('jfrog')) {
                                downloadFromArtifactory(url, targetPath)
                            } else {
                                downloadFromHttp(url, targetPath)
                            }

                            // Verify file was downloaded
                            def fileExists = sh(script: "test -f '${targetPath}' && echo 'true' || echo 'false'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                            if (fileExists != 'true') {
                                error "File not found after download: ${targetPath}"
                            }

                            def fileSize = sh(script: "stat -c%s '${targetPath}' 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z '${targetPath}' 2>/dev/null", returnStdout: true).trim()
                            echo "  Downloaded successfully (${formatFileSize(fileSize.toLong())})"

                            downloadResults[filename] = [
                                url: url,
                                path: targetPath,
                                size: fileSize,
                                status: 'SUCCESS'
                            ]
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            downloadResults[filename] = [
                                url: url,
                                path: targetPath,
                                size: '0',
                                status: 'FAILED',
                                error: e.message
                            ]
                            error "Failed to download artifact from ${url}: ${e.message}"
                        }
                    }

                    // Generate checksums
                    echo "Generating SHA256 checksums..."
                    sh """
                        cd ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
                        sha256sum * > checksums.sha256 2>/dev/null || shasum -a 256 * > checksums.sha256 2>/dev/null || true
                        cat checksums.sha256
                    """

                    // Store results for later stages
                    env.DOWNLOAD_RESULTS = groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(downloadResults)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Verifying Downloaded Artifacts ==="

                    def artifactFiles = sh(
                        script: "ls -1 ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/ | grep -v checksums.sha256",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().split('\n').findAll { it }

                    if (artifactFiles.isEmpty()) {
                        error "No artifacts found in ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}"
                    }

                    echo "Artifacts ready for deployment:"
                    artifactFiles.each { file ->
                        def fileInfo = sh(
                            script: "ls -lh ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${file}",
                            returnStdout: true
                        ).trim()
                        echo "  ${fileInfo}"

                        // Check if it's an archive and validate integrity
                        if (file.endsWith('.tar.gz') || file.endsWith('.tgz')) {
                            sh "gzip -t ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${file}"
                            echo "  ✓ gzip integrity check passed"
                        } else if (file.endsWith('.zip')) {
                            sh "unzip -t ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${file} > /dev/null"
                            echo "  ✓ zip integrity check passed"
                        } else if (file.endsWith('.jar') || file.endsWith('.war') || file.endsWith('.ear')) {
                            sh "unzip -t ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${file} > /dev/null"
                            echo "  ✓ archive integrity check passed"
                        }
                    }

                    echo "All artifacts verified successfully."
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Pre-Deployment Approval') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def artifactFiles = sh(
                        script: "ls -1 ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/ | grep -v checksums.sha256",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().split('\n').findAll { it }

                    def approvalMessage = """
                        |Deployment Summary:
                        |==================
                        |Artifacts (${artifactFiles.size()}):
                        |${artifactFiles.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}
                        |
                        |Target Servers (${servers.size()}):
                        |${servers.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}
                        |
                        |Deploy Path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}
                        |Rolling Deploy: ${params.ROLLING_DEPLOY}
                        |
                        |Proceed with deployment?
                    """.stripMargin()

                    timeout(time: 15, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        input message: approvalMessage, ok: 'Deploy to Production'
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "=== DRY RUN MODE - Simulating Deployment ==="
                        servers.each { server ->
                            echo "Would deploy to: ${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                        }
                        return
                    }

                    echo "=== Deploying to Production Servers ==="

                    if (params.ROLLING_DEPLOY) {
                        echo "Using rolling deployment strategy..."
                        servers.each { server ->
                            deployToServer(server)
                        }
                    } else {
                        echo "Using parallel deployment strategy..."
                        def parallelStages = [:]
                        servers.each { server ->
                            def serverName = server
                            parallelStages["Deploy to ${serverName}"] = {
                                deployToServer(serverName)
                            }
                        }
                        parallel parallelStages
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Health Checks') {
            when {
                expression { return params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATTERN?.trim() && !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Running Health Checks ==="

                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def timeout = params.HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT.toInteger()
                    def healthResults = [:]

                    servers.each { server ->
                        def healthUrl = params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATTERN.replace('{server}', server)
                        echo "Checking health: ${healthUrl}"

                        def healthy = false
                        def startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
                        def endTime = startTime + (timeout * 1000)

                        while (System.currentTimeMillis() < endTime && !healthy) {
                            try {
                                def response = sh(
                                    script: "curl -sf -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --connect-timeout 5 --max-time 10 '${healthUrl}'",
                                    returnStdout: true
                                ).trim()

                                if (response == '200') {
                                    healthy = true
                                    def elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000
                                    echo "  ✓ ${server} is healthy (took ${elapsed}s)"
                                } else {
                                    echo "  Waiting... (HTTP ${response})"
                                    sleep(5)
                                }
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "  Waiting... (${e.message})"
                                sleep(5)
                            }
                        }

                        healthResults[server] = healthy

                        if (!healthy) {
                            echo "  ✗ ${server} health check FAILED after ${timeout}s"
                        }
                    }

                    def failedServers = healthResults.findAll { !it.value }.collect { it.key }
                    if (failedServers) {
                        error "Health check failed for servers: ${failedServers.join(', ')}"
                    }

                    echo "All health checks passed!"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deployment Verification') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Post-Deployment Verification ==="

                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        servers.each { server ->
                            echo "Verifying deployment on ${server}..."

                            def result = sh(
                                script: """
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '
                                        echo "=== Deployment Directory ==="
                                        ls -la ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/
                                        echo ""
                                        echo "=== Disk Space ==="
                                        df -h ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}
                                        echo ""
                                        echo "=== Deployment Timestamp ==="
                                        cat ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/.deploy_metadata 2>/dev/null || echo "No metadata found"
                                    '
                                """,
                                returnStatus: true
                            )

                            if (result != 0) {
                                echo "WARNING: Verification returned non-zero exit code for ${server}"
                            } else {
                                echo "  ✓ ${server} verified"
                            }
                        }
                    }
